title: Taco's Programmer Tweaks
description: A PvP pack based off the programmer art textures. Can be used either standalone or on-top of the programmer art textures
body:
A Crystal PvP oriented pack based off the programmer art textures. Can be used standalon OR on-top of programmer art

Currently, changes have been made to the following textures:

- End Crystals
- Totems
- Bedrock
- Obsidian
- Crying obsidian
- Golden apples
- Slight changes to some HUD elements

To use, simply put the ZIP file into your resource packs folder and load it from the resource packs menu in-game.
